news.title: 'İran nükleer denetçilere izin verdi, ABD petrol yaptırımını kaldırdı'

news.title: Keir Starmer'ın istifasına giden süreçte neler yaşandı?
news.summary: İki yıl önce ezici bir seçim zaferi kazanmasına rağmen, liderlik popüleritesi sürekli düşen İngiltere başbakanı Keir Starmer, kendi partisi tarafından istifaya zorlandı.

news.title: 13 yıllık Nesim Bayram ve Evindar Tığrak cinayeti aydınlatıldı
news.summary: Ağrı’da 2013 yılından bu yana soruşturması devam eden Nesim Bayram ile 2025 yılında Batman’da kayıp olarak aranan Evindar Tığrak dosyasında önemli gelişmeler yaşandı.

news.title: Park halindeki iki otomobile çarpıp, kaçan alkollü sürücü aracında uyurken yakalandı
news.summary: Nevşehir’de park halindeki iki otomobile çarptıktan sonra bir sokakta aracında uyurken yakalanan alkollü sürücü E.G., polis tarafından uyandırıldı. Sürücüye 27 bin 719 TL ceza yazılırken, ehliyetine 6 ay el konuldu.

news.title: Uzman çavuştan 92 gün sonra acı haber
news.summary: Hatay’da trafik kazasında ağır yaralanan 53 yaşındaki Uzman Çavuş Hüseyin Sür, 92 gün süren hayat mücadelesini kaybetti.

news.title: Resmi Gazete'de bugün (23 Haziran 2026 Resmi Gazete kararları)
news.summary: Resmi Gazete'de 23 Haziran 2026 tarihli kararlar, yönetmelikler ve tebliğler yayımlandı. Resmi Gazete'de bugün neler var? İşte 23 Haziran 2026 tarihli ve 33289 Sayılı Resmi Gazete ayrıntıları.

news.title: Kavurucu sıcaklar başlıyor. Sıcaklık güneşin altında 45 dereceyi bulacak
news.summary: Bu hafta sıcaklıklar bir kademe daha artıyor. Özellikle batı bölgelerindeki birçok ilde sıcaklık 30 derecenin üzerinde olacak. Uzmanlar, havanın kuru olmasından dolayı perşembe gününe kadar da orman yangınlarına karşı uyarıda bulundu.

news.title: TFF başkanlık seçimi ne zaman?

news.title: US eases oil sanctions as Iran denies Vance claim on nuclear inspectors
news.summary: Iran's foreign ministry says it made "no new commitments" on nuclear inspections after talks in Switzerland.

news.title: At least 13 killed and dozens injured after Qatar gas explosion
news.summary: The city's main liquified natural gas (LNG) processing site suffered a "technical accident" in the Ras Laffan industrial zone.

news.title: Ransom note claims Nancy Guthrie died after abduction
news.summary: The note from the possible kidnappers reportedly stated that they did not mean for her to die and included an apology to the family.

news.title: Myanmar army killed over 700 civilians in six months, UN says
news.summary: The new UN report says the 702 civilian deaths over six months last year included 153 children.

news.title: Russian troop build-up threatens city seen as key to seizing Ukraine's Donbas
news.summary: If Kostyantynivka falls, Russian forces would be able push towards Ukraine's last remaining strongholds in the east.

news.title: WhatsApp to be led by Indian start-up founder as Will Cathcart steps back
news.summary: WhatsApp's leadership shake-up comes as Meta looks to strengthen its app's already booming presence in India.

news.title: Ronaldo, Portugal play Uzbekistan in World Cup: prediction and team news
news.summary: Cristiano Ronaldo's Portugal face Uzbekistan in a must-win group match, as race for the knockouts intensifies.

news.title: Giannis Antetokounmpo trade: Bucks star to join Miami Heat – reports
news.summary: The reported deal draws a line under months of speculation concerning the 10-time All-Star's future in Milwaukee.

news.title: Football offers escape for Gaza, but World Cup spirit dimmed
news.summary: Palestinians in Gaza struggle to find World Cup joy amid displacement, power outages, and memories of previous lives.

news.title: Palestine weekly wrap: Israel’s ‘quiet annexation’ grows louder
news.summary: Al Jazeera cameraman killed in Gaza, West Bank mosques torched, as Israeli officials describe attempt to expand control.

news.title: Algeria rally late to knock Jordan out of World Cup 2026
news.summary: Goals from Nadhir Benbouali and Amine Gouiri steer Algeria to a dramatic second-half comeback in Group J.

news.title: Colombia’s leftist presidential candidate vows to challenge election result
news.summary: Colombia’s leftist presidential candidate Ivan Cepeda has vowed to challenge the results of the presidential runoff.

news.title: Britain left the EU 10 years ago. Its politics has been an unruly mess
news.summary: Brexit fractured the European Union, and broke British politics. A decade on, millions of voters have deserted the two big parties for alternatives.

news.title: What to know about a cold storage warehouse fire in Los Angeles
news.summary: Firefighters are still battling a blaze at a massive frozen-food storage facility near downtown Los Angeles six days after the fire started.

news.title: Authorities arrest 2 more suspects in planned attack on Trump's UFC show
news.summary: Two more people in Missouri and Washington state have been arrested in connection with the planned attack. Law enforcement officials learned about the possible threat on June 10, four days before the event on the White House's South Lawn.

news.title: Gunman kills an officer at a Montreal hotel before being shot dead, police say
news.summary: Police say a suspect armed with a long gun opened fire at a Montreal hotel, killing a police officer before officers returned fire, killing him.

news.title: A federal judge finds a Trump data system to verify voters is unlawful
news.summary: Tens of millions of voters have had their data run through the Trump administration's revamped SAVE tool. A judge just found it unlawful.

news.title: Supreme Court declines to hear Texas man's intellectual disability case in capital case
news.summary: The court's action means Victor Saldaño is likely to be executed even though both defense and state experts determined he was not eligible for execution under the law.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
